name: Hero

parameters.name: Title
parameters.description: Plain-text headline, rendered as an h1 that also names the section landmark. Ignored (and the h1 omitted) when TitleSlot is used instead.

parameters.name: TitleSlot
parameters.description: Rich content slot for the headline, for when a plain-text Title isn't enough (e.g. inline styling, a gradient span). Rendered alongside Title if both are set.

parameters.name: Subtitle
parameters.description: Plain-text supporting copy below the title. Ignored when SubtitleSlot is used instead.

parameters.name: SubtitleSlot
parameters.description: Rich content slot for the supporting copy, for when plain-text Subtitle isn't enough.

parameters.name: Eyebrow
parameters.description: Small chip/label rendered above the title (e.g. "New" or a category tag).

parameters.name: Actions
parameters.description: Call-to-action buttons/links rendered below the subtitle.

parameters.name: Media
parameters.description: Side illustration/media slot. When set, the hero switches to a two-column grid layout with the text on one side and this media on the other.

parameters.name: Alignment
parameters.description: Horizontal alignment of the text column and its actions. Default: Start.

parameters.name: Class
parameters.description: Additional CSS classes merged onto the root section.

parameters.name: AdditionalAttributes
parameters.description: Additional HTML attributes captured and forwarded to the root section.

examples.title: Basic Hero
examples.code:
<Hero Title="Build faster with Lumeo"
      Subtitle="A complete Blazor component library with theming, accessibility, and density built in.">
    <Actions>
        <Button>Get started</Button>
        <Button Variant="Button.ButtonVariant.Outline">View components</Button>
    </Actions>
</Hero>

examples.title: With Eyebrow
examples.code:
<Hero Title="Version 3.5 is here"
      Subtitle="Marketing blocks, density scopes, and a smaller bundle.">
    <Eyebrow>
        <Badge Variant="Badge.BadgeVariant.Secondary">New</Badge>
    </Eyebrow>
    <Actions>
        <Button>Read the changelog</Button>
    </Actions>
</Hero>

examples.title: Centered Alignment
examples.code:
<Hero Alignment="Hero.HeroAlignment.Center"
      Title="Everything you need to ship"
      Subtitle="Forms, overlays, data display, charts, and motion — all in one package.">
    <Actions>
        <Button>Install</Button>
        <Button Variant="Button.ButtonVariant.Ghost">Docs</Button>
    </Actions>
</Hero>

mdSummary:
# Hero

Hero component.

**Package:** `Lumeo` · **Category:** Marketing
**Docs:** https://lumeo.nativ.sh/components/hero

## Parameters
| Owner | Name | Type | Default | Description |
|---|---|---|---|---|
| Hero | Title | `string?` | `` | Plain-text headline, rendered as an h1 that also names the section landmark. Ignored (and the h1 omitted) when TitleSlot is used instead. |
| Hero | TitleSlot | `RenderFragment?` | `` | Rich content slot for the headline, for when a plain-text Title isn't enough (e.g. inline styling, a gradient span). Rendered alongside Title if both are set. |
| Hero | Subtitle | `string?` | `` | Plain-text supporting copy below the title. Ignored when SubtitleSlot is used instead. |
| Hero | SubtitleSlot | `RenderFragment?` | `` | Rich content slot for the supporting copy, for when plain-text Subtitle isn't enough. |
| Hero | Eyebrow | `RenderFragment?` | `` | Small chip/label rendered above the title (e.g. "New" or a category tag). |
| Hero | Actions | `RenderFragment?` | `` | Call-to-action buttons/links rendered below the subtitle. |
| Hero | Media | `RenderFragment?` | `` | Side illustration/media slot. When set, the hero switches to a two-column grid layout with the text on one side and this media on the other. |
| Hero | Alignment | `HeroAlignment` | `HeroAlignment.Start` | Horizontal alignment of the text column and its actions. Default: Start. |
| Hero | Class | `string?` | `` | Additional CSS classes merged onto the root section. |
| Hero | AdditionalAttributes | `Dictionary<string, object>?` | `` | Additional HTML attributes captured and forwarded to the root section. |

## Slots
- `TitleSlot` (Hero) — Rich content slot for the headline, for when a plain-text Title isn't enough (e.g. inline styling, a gradient span). Rendered alongside Title if both are set.
- `SubtitleSlot` (Hero) — Rich content slot for the supporting copy, for when plain-text Subtitle isn't enough.
- `Eyebrow` (Hero) — Small chip/label rendered above the title (e.g. "New" or a category tag).
- `Actions` (Hero) — Call-to-action buttons/links rendered below the subtitle.
- `Media` (Hero) — Side illustration/media slot. When set, the hero switches to a two-column grid layout with the text on one side and this media on the other.

## Events
- (none)

## Sub-components
- (none)

## Cascading values it expects
- (none)

## Services it injects
- (none)

## Keyboard
—

## Example
```razor
<Hero />
```

## CSS variables
`--color-foreground`, `--color-muted`, `--color-muted-foreground`

## Files
- `UI/Hero/Hero.razor`
